page_content:
Repeatable to: 6 credits.

JOUR799 Master's Thesis Research (1-6 Credits)

JOUR800 Introduction to Doctoral Study in Journalism and Public Communication (3 Credits)

Basic skills in journalism and public communication research. Credit Only Granted for. JOUR700 or JOUR800.

Formerly: JOUR700.

JOUR801 Advanced Public Communication Theory (3 Credits) Advanced selected survey of communication & media theory. Prerequisite: JOUR601, or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department.
